# Logwick Documentation

## Quick start

1. Sign up at https://logwick.io — get your API key
2. npm install logwick (or pip install logwick)
3. Add one line after your AI call

## SDKs

Node.js: npm install logwick
Python: pip install logwick
MCP: npx @logwick/mcp

## Code examples

JavaScript:
logwick.fire({ agent: 'gpt-4o', action: 'email_draft', status: 'success', input: prompt, output: result, tokens: 312 })

Python:
logwick.fire({ 'agent': 'gpt-4o', 'action': 'email_draft', 'status': 'success', 'input': prompt, 'output': result })

## Wrappers

logwick.openai(() => openai.chat.completions.create(...), { action: 'email_draft' })
logwick.anthropic(() => anthropic.messages.create(...), { action: 'review' })
logwick.gemini(() => model.generateContent(prompt), { action: 'analysis' })

## MCP

Add to claude_desktop_config.json:
{ "mcpServers": { "logwick": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@logwick/mcp"], "env": { "LOGWICK_API_KEY": "sk-lw-..." } } } }

Full docs: https://logwick.io/docs
